##LOCALITY=Transvaal, South Africa
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=University of Arizona Mineral Museum
##DESCRIPTION=Black to blue fibrous, known as blue asbestos

##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=([box]_0.98_K_0.02_)(Na_0.98_Ca_0.02_)_2_(Fe^2+^_0.85_Mg_0.15_)_3_(Fe^3+^_0.99_[box]_0.01_)_2_Si_8.00_O_22_(OH)_2_
